title: The Soul
content:
An heritage of hopes and fears
    And dreams and memory,
    And vices of ten thousand years
    God gives to thee.

    A house of clay, the home of Fate,
    Haunted of Love and Sin,
    Where Death stands knocking at the gate
    To let him in.
meaning:
Madison Julius Cawein's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Soul"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
